description: Full breach witnessed from the research boat at 07:40 local time. The shark launched completely clear of the water targeting an elephant seal decoy we were trailing. Estimated airtime of around 2 seconds — the whole boat fell silent. On re-entry the splash soaked everyone on the port side. This is the largest individual we have recorded at the Farallones this season. Tagged her 'Goliath'. Drone footage captured the full breach.
